case_title: NATALIA TER-GAZARIAN VS. ROCKET DOG RESCUE

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,989.95 FILED BY TER-GAZARIAN, NATALIA AS TO DEFENDANT ROCKET DOG RESCUE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-22-2015 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
